client.title: Asker Dashboard
client.noJobs: You haven't posted any jobs yet.
client.closeConfirm: Are you sure you want to close this job? This cannot be undone.

pro.title: Professional Dashboard
pro.browseMatchingJobsHint: Find and respond to open client requests
pro.myInsightsHint: See what clients are searching for in your area
pro.insightsComingSoonDesc: Track your profile views, message activity, and job performance — all in one place.
pro.browseJobsHint: Find work that matches your skills
pro.setupDescription: Add your services to start receiving matched job opportunities.
pro.servicesFirstTitle: Start with your services — it's how you get work
pro.servicesFirstDesc: Your services are how we match you to real job requests from clients on the island. No services = no matched jobs landing in your dashboard.
pro.servicesFirstWhy: Your profile matters too, but services come first — they're the engine that drives leads to you. You can polish your profile later.
pro.serviceCategoriesHint: Used to match you to jobs
pro.myListingsHint: Complete these so clients can discover and book you
pro.editMyServicesHint: Add or remove the jobs you accept
pro.createServicePagesHint: Build the pages clients see when browsing
pro.manageListingsPageHint: Want to be seen more? Complete and publish your service pages so clients can discover you in the marketplace.
pro.manageServicesHint: Want more opportunities? Select the types of work you do — we use these to match you with real client requests.
pro.jobPrioritiesHint: Get more of the work you want
pro.myJobsSubtitle: Jobs where a client has accepted your quote or hired you directly.
pro.noAssignedJobs: No active jobs yet. Browse the job board to find and respond to open requests.
pro.emptyDrafts: No drafts yet. Add service categories and we'll create listing drafts for you automatically.
pro.emptyLive: No live listings yet. Complete and publish a draft to appear in the marketplace.
pro.emptyDrafts: No draft listings. Add categories to create drafts.
pro.emptyLive: No live listings yet. Edit and publish your drafts to go live.
pro.matchedJobsDesc: Jobs that match your selected services
pro.noMatchedJobs: No matched jobs yet. Check back soon!
pro.setUpServicesToSee: Set up your services to see matched jobs.
pro.communityForumHint: Ask questions, share tips, get help
pro.addServicesHint: Add services + complete your profile to appear in search results.

stage.needsProfileDesc: Add your name and details so clients know who you are.
stage.needsServicesDesc: Your services are how we match you to real job requests. No services = no matched jobs.
stage.needsReviewDesc: You're almost there — finish your setup to start receiving jobs.
stage.needsVisibilityDesc: Your profile is ready but hidden. Toggle visibility so clients can find you.

pro.welcomeBody: When a client posts a matching job, it'll appear here. You can update your profile later as you start receiving work.
pro.emptyMatchedBody: We'll show new jobs here when they match your services and areas. Want more? Add more services to widen your reach.
pro.prompt1Body: Add your business name and tagline so clients know who you are.
pro.prompt2Body: Add a short bio to help them trust you.

matchAndSend.noMatch: No matching professionals found yet. Try posting to the job board instead.
matchAndSend.postSuccess: Your job has been posted — review matched professionals below
matchAndSend.successDesc: Professionals in your area will see your job and can respond directly. You can also invite specific pros below.
matchAndSend.emptyTitle: Your job is live on the board
matchAndSend.emptyDesc: Professionals in this category will see your job and can respond directly. You'll receive notifications when someone quotes.

jobTicket.closeConfirm: Are you sure you want to close this job?
jobTicket.savedBanner: Saved — you can invite professionals or post publicly anytime.
jobTicket.shareTitle: How would you like to share this job?
jobTicket.postToBoardDesc: All professionals in this category can see and respond
jobTicket.alreadyPosted: Already posted — professionals can see and respond
jobTicket.jobPosted: Job posted to the job board!
jobTicket.postFailed: Failed to post job. Please try again.
jobTicket.inviteSpecificDesc: Browse matching professionals, view profiles, and send this job directly
jobTicket.waitingForQuotes: Your job is live — professionals have been notified. You'll receive an email when quotes arrive.
jobTicket.shareToGetQuotes: Share your job to start receiving quotes from professionals.
jobTicket.completeDesc: Once you mark the job as complete, you'll be asked to leave a review.
jobTicket.completeConfirm: Mark this job as completed? This confirms the work is done.
jobTicket.reviewHelps: Your review helps other clients and builds trust on the platform.

quoteComparison.title: Compare Quotes
quoteComparison.quoteAccepted: Quote accepted — professional has been notified!
quoteComparison.onlyOneQuote: You've received 1 quote so far. More may be on the way.
